title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at FIITJEE - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at FIITJEE - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the FIITJEE family as a Curriculum Developer in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FIITJEE:
FIITJEE is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FIITJEE!
